stocks.ai_explanation: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. (TSM) is a leading semiconductor manufacturer based in Taiwan. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD) is a major player in the semiconductor industry, known for its AMD Ryzen processors. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Applied Materials, Inc. (ASML) is a Dutch multinational company specializing in advanced manufacturing technologies. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Intel Corporation (INTC) is a leading technology company focused on computing and data processing. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. (QCOM) is a global leader in wireless communications. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
